resources.string: Xposed module for modifying ColorOS system UI\nThis module is completely free and will be open-sourced at an appropriate time\nDeveloper: MouZuan
Visual Restoration & Enhancement\n• UI Beautification Expansion
This Xposed module is used to modify and beautify ColorOS system UI. A restart of the target scope is required for changes to take effect.

1.0.1 Changelog
 1. Minimum support Android 14 for installation, functions only available on Android 15 and above
 2. Optimized partial interface UI
 3. Project language switched to Kotlin
 4. Added English support (machine translation)
 5. New features: Silent tile, OTG tile; Optimized 2x1 tile background to white transparent
 6. Signature updated, please uninstall old version before reinstalling
 7. Config file moved to private directory, reduced some app permissions
 8. Added non-mandatory Root permission acquisition function
Root request failed, some functions may not work
Storage permission denied, some functions may not work
Storage permission is required to read and write configuration files
To read and write configuration files, please grant "All files access" in settings.
Configuration saved. Restart SystemUI to apply changes.
Restart failed, please check root permission
